info.name: Zaffabit Customer App Screen Flow
info.description: Chronological end-to-end screen-by-screen testing flow for Zaffabit Customer App. Start from Request 1 and proceed sequentially. Session variables (tokens, address IDs, booking IDs) are captured automatically by post-response test scripts.

request.description: Splash Screen: Initiates app startup and pulls splash content, banners, and default configuration metadata.
Login Screen: Customer inputs their phone number and triggers authentication SMS code verification.
OTP Screen: Verifies verification code. Dynamically updates the `customerToken` variable in your environment.
Language Selection Screen: Sets locale preference to 'ml' (Malayalam), 'en' (English), 'hi' (Hindi), or 'ta' (Tamil).
Name Screen: Onboarding setup to save the user's first and last name values.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK

request.description: Location & Map Selection Screen: Queries map location latitude/longitude coordinates (Mocked endpoint for manual search override).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Home Flat",
  "addressLine1": "Flat 8A, Skyline apartments",
  "city": "Kochi",
  "pincode": "682030",

    "lat": 10.0159,
    "lng": 76.3419
  },
  "title": "Home Flat",
  "houseName": "Flat 8A, Skyline apartments",
  "latitude": 10.0159,
  "longitude": 76.3419
}

request.description: Custom Home Details Screen: Configures size metrics of the property.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK

request.description: HomeScreen: Fetches active sliding banner cards and featured category items.
ServiceList: Displays available sub-services. Stores the first returned service record's ID as `serviceId`.

request.description: Hourly/Custom Services Estimation: Performs coefficient-based duration and cost calculations.
Cart View: Adds selected cleaning package parameters into the customer's checkout cart.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK

request.description: Add More Services Screen: Pulls active items inside the cart to cross-reference with upsell options.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK

request.description: Schedule Config: Queries active day-ahead horizons and dynamic hourly slots available for customer selection.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK

request.description: Booking Summary / Billing Details: Finalizes invoice details and generates a pending booking. Stores the created `bookingId` automatically.

response.name: Simulated Response - Created

request.description: Payment Verification: Validates payment signature credentials to flag booking state as 'confirmed'.

response.name: Simulated Response - OK
